What We Install

Lighting Solutions for Every Property

From cozy residential rooflines to large commercial facades, our patented channel system creates a clean, professional look that lasts decades.

🏠
Residential

Replace the annual struggle of holiday light installation with permanent trim lighting. Control every bulb from your smartphone — any color, any pattern, any occasion.

01
🏢
Commercial

Increase storefront visibility, reinforce brand colors, and enhance security with programmable exterior LED systems that stand out day and night.

02
🏛️
Municipal

Elevate city buildings, parks, and landmarks with energy-efficient permanent lighting. Program for holidays, events, and community celebrations remotely.

03
🎄
Holiday Themes

Endless built-in holiday presets — Christmas, Halloween, Fourth of July, and more. Schedule lights to automatically switch themes by date or event.

04
🔧
Professional Install

Our certified NJ technicians handle everything from measure to mount. Clean, hidden wiring. Patented channels protect your investment through any weather.

05
🛡️
Lifetime Warranty

Every Trimlight installation comes backed by a lifetime product warranty on the LED system. We stand behind our work — permanently.

06
The Process

From Estimate to Illumination

01
Free Estimate

We measure your roofline, gutters, and fascia to deliver a precise, no-obligation quote. Usually within 48 hours.

02
Design & Plan

Choose your zone layout, colors, and connectivity options. We design a system specific to your property's architecture.

03
Expert Install

Certified NJ technicians install the patented channel system in a single day for most homes. Clean, concealed wiring.

04
App, Go Live

Download the Trimlight app, connect to your WiFi controller, and you're in control of 16 million colors — forever.

Smart Control

Your Entire Home,
One App

The Trimlight app gives you complete control from anywhere. Set schedules, create scenes, and sync to music or holidays automatically.

  • ✦
